title: Senior Frontend Developer at DeHaat International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at DeHaat International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DeHaat International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About DeHaat International Enterprises:
DeHaat International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DeHaat International Enterprises!
